queries.name: Real-Time Cell Site Performance Degradation Detection
queries.pain_point: Proactive Network Capacity Planning & Congestion Management - Use historical trending and predictive analytics to identify cells approaching capacity limits
queries.query:
FROM cell_performance_metrics
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS avg_call_drop_rate = AVG(kpi.call_drop_rate), avg_prb_util = AVG(network.cell.prb_utilization_dl_pct), avg_ho_success = AVG(network.handover.success_rate) BY network.cell.id
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| INLINESTATS regional_avg_drop_rate = AVG(avg_call_drop_rate), regional_avg_prb = AVG(avg_prb_util) BY cell_site_inventory.network.region.name
| EVAL degradation_score = (avg_call_drop_rate / regional_avg_drop_rate) + (avg_prb_util / regional_avg_prb) - (avg_ho_success / 100)
| WHERE degradation_score > 2.5 OR avg_prb_util > 85
| EVAL alert_priority = CASE(degradation_score > 4, "CRITICAL", degradation_score > 3, "HIGH", "MEDIUM")
| SORT degradation_score DESC
| KEEP network.cell.id, cell_site_inventory.network.cell.name, cell_site_inventory.network.region.name, cell_site_inventory.network.noc.team, avg_call_drop_rate, avg_prb_util, degradation_score, alert_priority
| LIMIT 50
queries.description: Detects cell sites experiencing performance degradation in last 15 minutes by comparing against regional averages, enabling sub-5 minute MTTD vs current 30+ minutes

queries.name: Subscriber-Centric Experience Troubleshooting with Network Context
queries.pain_point: Fragmented subscriber experience visibility across network domains requiring manual correlation across vendor-specific Element Management Systems
queries.query:
FROM network_signaling_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 2 hours AND subscriber.imsi == ?subscriber_imsi
| LOOKUP JOIN subscriber_profiles ON subscriber.imsi
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| STATS procedure_count = COUNT(*), success_count = COUNT_IF(network.procedure.success == true), avg_rsrp = AVG(network.radio.rsrp_dbm), avg_sinr = AVG(network.radio.sinr_db), cell_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(network.cell.id) BY network.procedure.type, cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name
| EVAL success_rate_pct = (success_count / procedure_count) * 100
| EVAL signal_quality = CASE(avg_rsrp > -80 AND avg_sinr > 10, "EXCELLENT", avg_rsrp > -95 AND avg_sinr > 5, "GOOD", avg_rsrp > -105, "FAIR", "POOR")
| SORT procedure_count DESC
| KEEP network.procedure.type, cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name, procedure_count, success_rate_pct, avg_rsrp, avg_sinr, signal_quality, cell_count
queries.description: Provides complete unified view of individual subscriber network experience across all vendors and domains for rapid complaint resolution, eliminating manual correlation

queries.name: Multi-Vendor Network Performance Benchmarking
queries.pain_point: Lack of standardized KPIs and metrics framework across NOC teams preventing enterprise-wide benchmarking
queries.query:
FROM cell_performance_metrics
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 24 hours
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| FORK
  (STATS avg_call_success = AVG(kpi.call_success_rate), avg_ho_success = AVG(network.handover.success_rate), avg_rrc_success = AVG(network.rrc.connection_success_rate), p95_prb_util = PERCENTILE(capacity.busy_hour.prb_utilization_p95, 95) BY cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name | EVAL dimension = "vendor" | RENAME cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name AS segment_name)
  (STATS avg_call_success = AVG(kpi.call_success_rate), avg_ho_success = AVG(network.handover.success_rate), avg_rrc_success = AVG(network.rrc.connection_success_rate), p95_prb_util = PERCENTILE(capacity.busy_hour.prb_utilization_p95, 95) BY cell_site_inventory.network.region.name | EVAL dimension = "region" | RENAME cell_site_inventory.network.region.name AS segment_name)
  (STATS avg_call_success = AVG(kpi.call_success_rate), avg_ho_success = AVG(network.handover.success_rate), avg_rrc_success = AVG(network.rrc.connection_success_rate), p95_prb_util = PERCENTILE(capacity.busy_hour.prb_utilization_p95, 95) BY cell_site_inventory.network.technology | EVAL dimension = "technology" | RENAME cell_site_inventory.network.technology AS segment_name)
queries.description: Enables objective standardized KPI comparison across vendors, regions, and technologies simultaneously using parallel analysis paths for enterprise-wide benchmarking

queries.name: Automated Root Cause Analysis with Event Correlation
queries.pain_point: Extended MTTR (2-4 hours) due to manual root cause analysis workflows across multiple systems
queries.query:
FROM network_signaling_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1 hour AND network.procedure.success == false
| EVAL time_bucket = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp)
| STATS failure_count = COUNT(*), failure_codes = VALUES(network.procedure.result_code) BY time_bucket, network.cell.id, network.procedure.type
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| LOOKUP JOIN network_procedures_reference ON network.procedure.type
| INLINESTATS avg_failures = AVG(failure_count), stddev_failures = STDDEV(failure_count) BY network.procedure.type
| EVAL anomaly_score = (failure_count - avg_failures) / stddev_failures
| WHERE anomaly_score > 2 OR failure_count > 100
| EVAL root_cause_indicator = CASE(network_procedures_reference.network.procedure.category == "RRC" AND anomaly_score > 3, "Capacity_Overload", network_procedures_reference.network.procedure.category == "Handover" AND anomaly_score > 3, "Inter_Cell_Interference", "Configuration_Issue")
| SORT anomaly_score DESC
| KEEP time_bucket, network.cell.id, cell_site_inventory.network.cell.name, network.procedure.type, failure_count, anomaly_score, root_cause_indicator, failure_codes
| LIMIT 100
queries.description: Automatically correlates failure events and suggests probable root causes using statistical anomaly detection, reducing MTTR from 2-4 hours to under 30 minutes

queries.name: Intelligent Incident Pattern Discovery with Semantic Search
queries.pain_point: Inability to correlate network events with subscriber behavior patterns across disparate systems
queries.query:
FROM network_incidents
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 30 days AND SEMANTIC(incident.description, "capacity congestion high subscriber density PRB utilization")
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| STATS incident_count = COUNT(*), avg_mttr = AVG(incident.mttr_minutes), total_affected_subs = SUM(incident.affected_subscribers) BY cell_site_inventory.network.region.name, cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name, incident.severity
| EVAL mttr_category = CASE(avg_mttr < 30, "Fast", avg_mttr < 120, "Moderate", "Slow")
| WHERE incident_count > 5
| SORT incident_count DESC
| KEEP cell_site_inventory.network.region.name, cell_site_inventory.network.vendor.name, incident.severity, incident_count, avg_mttr, mttr_category, total_affected_subs
queries.description: Uses semantic search to discover similar incident patterns related to capacity issues across regions and vendors, enabling proactive pattern-based prevention

queries.name: Network Anomaly Detection with Change Point Analysis
queries.pain_point: Reactive troubleshooting driven by subscriber complaints rather than proactive detection, with 15-30 minute MTTD delays
queries.query:
FROM network_signaling_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 6 hours
| EVAL time_bucket = DATE_TRUNC(5 minutes, @timestamp)
| STATS unique_subscribers = COUNT_DISTINCT(subscriber.imsi) BY time_bucket, network.cell.id
| CHANGE_POINT unique_subscribers BY time_bucket
| WHERE change_point_detected == true
| LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id
| EVAL alert_type = "Subscriber_Churn_Spike"
| SORT time_bucket DESC
| KEEP time_bucket, network.cell.id, cell_site_inventory.network.cell.name, cell_site_inventory.network.region.name, cell_site_inventory.network.noc.team, unique_subscribers, alert_type
| LIMIT 50
queries.description: Detects statistically significant changes in subscriber activity patterns per cell site, enabling proactive detection before complaints arrive and reducing MTTD to under 5 minutes

queries.name: Unified NOC Dashboard Multi-Dimensional View
queries.pain_point: Insufficient real-time analytics for high-cardinality network data with 15-60 minute batch processing delays
queries.query:
FUSE
  (FROM cell_performance_metrics | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes | STATS avg_call_drop = AVG(kpi.call_drop_rate), avg_prb_util = AVG(network.cell.prb_utilization_dl_pct) | EVAL metric_category = "performance_kpis")
  (FROM network_signaling_events | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes | STATS total_procedures = COUNT(*), success_rate = AVG(CASE(network.procedure.success == true, 100, 0)) | EVAL metric_category = "signaling_health")
  (FROM network_incidents | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes | STATS critical_incidents = COUNT_IF(incident.severity == "CRITICAL"), high_incidents = COUNT_IF(incident.severity == "HIGH") | EVAL metric_category = "active_incidents")
  (FROM cell_performance_metrics | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes AND network.cell.prb_utilization_dl_pct > 80 | LOOKUP JOIN cell_site_inventory ON network.cell.id | STATS congested_cells = COUNT_DISTINCT(network.cell.id) BY cell_site_inventory.network.region.name | EVAL metric_category = "capacity_alerts")
queries.description: Provides real-time unified executive dashboard combining performance KPIs, signaling health, incidents, and capacity alerts with sub-minute latency vs 15-60 minute batch delays
